title: palicourea calycina
intro: Palicourea calycina, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is also known as the Yellow Bitterwood. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea calycina include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
